text: I just got accepted into my dream university! I can't believe it, I've been working towards this for years and it finally happened!
My grandmother passed away last night. She was the kindest person I ever knew and the house feels so empty without her.
Oh great, another meeting that could have been an email. Just what I needed to make my Monday even more productive.
The doctor said the test results were inconclusive and we need to run more tests next week. I haven't been able to sleep since the appointment.
I opened my front door and there was a puppy sitting on the porch with a bow on its collar. My partner had been planning this surprise for months!
The restaurant served us raw chicken and then had the audacity to charge full price. When I complained, the manager just shrugged and walked away.
The quarterly earnings report will be released on Friday. Analysts expect moderate growth consistent with sector trends.
Sure, I absolutely love standing in the rain for two hours because someone forgot to book the venue. Best day ever, really.
I am happy for her promotion but at the same time I feel left behind. We started at the same time and I thought we were on the same track.
Walking through the old neighborhood brought back so many memories. Some made me smile, but mostly I just felt a deep ache for everything that has changed.
